title: lithocarpus ternaticupulus f. matsudae
intro: Lithocarpus ternaticupulus f. matsudae is a variant of the Lithocarpus ternaticupulus species, commonly known as a type of evergreen tree native to Taiwan. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus ternaticupulus f. matsudae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
